name: @geoapify/batch-geocoding
description: Batch geocoding library with Geoapify API to geocode addresses and reverse geocode latitude/longitude coordinates.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run compile && webpack && npm run compile:esm
scripts.compile:esm:entry: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const lines=[\"import lib from './bundle.mjs';\",\"export const Batcher = lib.Batcher;\",\"export const BatcherJob = lib.BatcherJob;\",\"export const ApiClient = lib.ApiClient;\",\"export const JOB_STATE = lib.JOB_STATE;\",\"export const BatchGeocodingError = lib.BatchGeocodingError;\",\"export const ValidationError = lib.ValidationError;\",\"export const ApiError = lib.ApiError;\",\"export const JobSubmitError = lib.JobSubmitError;\",\"export default lib;\",\"\"];fs.mkdirSync('dist/esm',{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync('dist/esm/index.mjs',lines.join('\\n'));"
scripts.demo:prepare: npm run compile:env && npm run build
